arguments.argument: The AI should maintain strict educational accuracy to uphold professionalism, ensuring students receive reliable and truthful information. Compromising accuracy risks misinforming students, undermining trust, and diluting educational value. Instead, the AI can enhance engagement through interactive and adaptive methods without sacrificing integrity.
